summary.verdict: MRTX1133 shows very poor binding to WT KRAS. Low ligand confidence (pLDDT 38.2), high interface PAE (12.8 Å), weak predicted affinity (Ki ~890 nM), and minimal Switch II burial (185 Å² vs 485 Å² for G12D). The absence of ASP12 eliminates a critical hydrogen bond anchor, confirming the structural basis for G12D selectivity.
